# Tamboui

> TamboUI is a library for building terminal UIs in Java. It is inspired by Ratatui and Textua.

All TamboUI documentation pages are available in LLM-friendly Markdown format by using https://markdown.new/ with any URL.

For example:
- HTML: https://tamboui.dev/docs/main/index.html
- Markdown: https://markdown.new/https://tamboui.dev/docs/main/index.html

 ## Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://markdown.new/https://tamboui.dev/docs/main/getting-started.html): Getting started Guide
- [Core Concepts](https://markdown.new/https://tamboui.dev/docs/main/core-concepts.html): Core concepts of TamboUI
- [API Levels](https://markdown.new/https://tamboui.dev/docs/main/api-levels.html): API Levels of TamboUI
- [Bindings](https://markdown.new/https://tamboui.dev/docs/main/bindings.html): Bindings of TamboUI
- [MVC Architecture](https://markdown.new/https://tamboui.dev/docs/main/mvc-architecture.html): MVC Model of TamboUI
- [Developer Guide](https://markdown.new/https://tamboui.dev/docs/main/developer-guide.html): Developer Guide covering how to create custom widgets and components in TamboUI
